summary: rc.22 combined hygiene + auto-heal rc bundling 5 scopes: (A) event-ledger rotation with sliding-window-by-age + 50MB soft warn; (B) baseline KB filename unification to ${id}--${slug}.md with fab scan auto-migration + doctor hard-error lint; (C) baseline tags drop (γ-strategy — emit tags: []); (D) read-side agents.meta.json auto-heal with new loadActiveMeta helper, wired into 4 engine read paths + CLI shim + hook banner + doctor severity demote + AGENTS.md rule text refresh; (E) root-cause fix in reconcileKnowledge — dual-root file scan + force-write on revision drift. Ends with full-repo dogfood (T8) and one batch Gemini review + cite-coverage + MEMORY.md SHIPPED entry (T9, per feedback_review_batching).
approach: Decompose into 16 feature-scoped tasks (not file-scoped) across 5 functional scopes + 2 end-of-rc tasks. Sequencing: Scope A chain (T1→T2→T3→T4) independent; Scope B (T5, T6) and Scope C (T7) fully independent; Scope D chain (T8→T9→T10→T11) with T12 + T13 independent within D; Scope E (T14) depends on T8 (loadActiveMeta primitives may be reused). T15 dogfood merge-forks all impl tasks; T16 review depends on T15. All scopes follow pre-user clean-slate (no compat shims) and feedback_cli_design (drift→abort, no --force). All design decisions pre-locked via two prior grill sessions — no clarification needed.
estimated_time: 8-12 hours focused work (excluding wall-clock waits on CI/Gemini review)

design_decisions.decision: Scope E uses Option 2 (root-cause fix in reconcileKnowledge)
design_decisions.rationale: Covers MCP startup ensureKnowledgeFresh callers + future write-side flows; symmetry with findKnowledgeFiles dual-root pattern; T-D1 auto-heal only protects read-side
design_decisions.tradeoff: Larger blast radius vs Option 1 (mitigated by 5 unit tests + T8 dogfood)

design_decisions.decision: loadActiveMeta exposes TWO entry points (strict + graceful)
design_decisions.rationale: planContext is hint-time advisor (degradation-safe); sections/get/extract are authoritative content contracts (must fail loud); extractKnowledge counter must be fresh
design_decisions.tradeoff: Two functions to maintain (small cost; single module export)

design_decisions.decision: Auto-heal event is new enum knowledge_meta_auto_healed (not reuse meta_reconciled)
design_decisions.rationale: Trigger semantics differ (implicit-on-read vs explicit-reconcile); telemetry + cite-coverage filters benefit from distinction
design_decisions.tradeoff: One more enum value to schema-test (trivial)

design_decisions.decision: agents_meta_stale demoted to warning, NOT removed entirely
design_decisions.rationale: Still useful operator visibility for transient drift detection; CI exit-code 0 prevents pipeline flakiness with auto-heal
design_decisions.tradeoff: Slight risk operators ignore warning permanently (mitigated by hook banner surfacing actual heal events)

design_decisions.decision: Scope B doctor lint rule is HARD ERROR (no --force escape)
design_decisions.rationale: Matches feedback_cli_design drift→abort; fab scan is one-step migration so users have frictionless escape hatch
design_decisions.tradeoff: Users on legacy layout blocked from clean doctor until fab scan runs once (intentional)

design_decisions.decision: Scope C γ-strategy: emit tags: [] instead of fixing the 4 bugs (α) or per-builder semantic tags (β)
design_decisions.rationale: α leaves semantic-mismatch tags (code-style.md mistagged 'typescript'); β over-engineered for 6 fixed slots; type-based filtering is precise enough; pre-user clean-slate allows breaking change
design_decisions.tradeoff: searchEntries cannot tag-match baselines anymore (acceptable; users filter by type)

design_decisions.decision: Migration auto-runs inside fab scan, NOT doctor --fix or one-shot codemod
design_decisions.rationale: fab scan is already the canonical baseline-emit command; allowlist (hardcoded baseline ids) prevents touching user entries; single-command UX
design_decisions.tradeoff: Hardcoded allowlist needs update if new baseline slot added later (small surface)

design_decisions.decision: One Gemini batch review at end of rc (T16), NOT per-task
design_decisions.rationale: feedback_review_batching memo from rc.20/21 — cross-scope review catches interaction issues per-task review misses
design_decisions.tradeoff: Single point of failure if Gemini API hiccups (mitigated by Qwen fallback)

data_flow.diagram: fab scan → emit id-prefixed baselines + run migration (B+C) → writeKnowledgeMeta updates agents.meta.json | MCP plan_context call → loadActiveMetaOrStale (D) → if stale: writeKnowledgeMeta + emit knowledge_meta_auto_healed event → planContext result carries auto_healed flag → plan-context-hint CLI shim → hook renders 🔄 banner | fab doctor --fix → reconcileKnowledge (E fixed: dual-root + revision-drift force-write) + rotateEventLedgerIfNeeded (A) → events.archive/events-rotated-YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl

stages.output: { meta, auto_healed, previous_revision_hash, revision_hash } + events.jsonl knowledge_meta_auto_healed entry
stderr lines: banner + entries + revision_hash + (auto-refresh if auto_healed) + usage hint
transformations: conditional auto-refresh line insertion via banner-i18n

stages.output: .fabric/events.archive/events-rotated-YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl + truncated main with events_rotated audit first-line

transformations: force writeKnowledgeMeta on revisionDrift even if events empty

_metadata.scope_e_decision: Option 2 root-cause fix in reconcileKnowledge (dual-root + revision-drift force-write)
_metadata.ordering_summary: A‖B‖C‖D-prefix run independently; D2/3/4 chain after D1; E depends on D1; T15 dogfood merge-forks all impl; T16 review after T15

dimensions_passed: completeness (all 5 scopes A/B/C/D/E + dogfood T15 + review T16 covered)
dependencies (no circular deps; valid DAG; T15 merge_fork closes loop correctly)
implementation_steps (all tasks have >=2 steps; T3=6, T16=9)
constraint_compliance (pre-user clean-slate / feedback_cli_design / feedback_review_batching all honored)
quality_check.note: Risk flag: T14 reconcileKnowledge dual-root change is highest-risk; T15 dogfood is the gating regression check.
